name: Bone of the Ancients
description: An Eridian E-tech relic that pairs a single elemental damage bonus with faster Action Skill cooldown. It is one of the strongest general-purpose relics for element-focused builds, especially when you can match the rolled element to both your weapons and your skill tree.
notes:
It rolls as Incendiary, Shock, or Corrosive and drops from Legendary Loot Midgets.

At level 90, the Action Skill cooldown bonus can reach 51.0%, and the elemental damage bonus can reach 42.0%.

special.description: Rolls with a single elemental damage bonus, either incendiary, shock, or corrosive. It increases damage for that element and speeds up Action Skill recharge. The elemental damage bonus is multiplicative rather than additive like most gun-damage boosts.

abilities: Improves elemental damage and action skill
